name: paper-metaballs
title: Metaballs
author: Paper
description: Renders an animated field of merging colored metaballs.

changes: Added a prominent Apache-2.0 modification notice and repointed @paper-design/shaders imports to the copied source-local core modules.
Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.
Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.
Added a prominent modification notice, restored the Ashima Arts/Ian McEwan attribution, and embedded the full MIT license for the adapted 2D simplex-noise routine.
Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.

Added a prominent Apache-2.0 modification notice, repointed @paper-design/shaders imports to copied source-local modules, mapped prefers-reduced-motion to the supplied frame at speed zero, and added a deterministic solid-color fallback when WebGL2 is unavailable.
Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.

license.scope: packages/shaders-react/src/shaders/metaballs.tsx and its exact copied packages/shaders-react/src and packages/shaders/src import closure; shader-utils.ts includes an MIT-licensed Ashima Arts 2D simplex-noise adaptation
copyright: Copyright (C) 2011-2016 by Stefan Gustavson (Classic noise and others)

changes: Appended the Taste Blocks TypeScript-consumer import adaptation notice after the upstream notice text; original upstream SHA-256 was sha256:c3155d6a359d9841d63f7feb4938d2c99bb4ef681fa20be1eb4bfa71307f746b.

provenanceEvidence.author: Ian McEwan, Ashima Arts
provenanceEvidence.adaptation: Paper Shaders inlined the modulo helper and omitted the original header; Taste Blocks restored the attribution and full MIT text without changing the shader math.

modifications.change: Added a prominent Apache-2.0 modification notice and repointed @paper-design/shaders imports to the copied source-local core modules. Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied React export installable with its exact copied core closure.

modifications.change: Added a prominent modification notice, restored the Ashima Arts/Ian McEwan attribution, and embedded the full MIT license for the adapted 2D simplex-noise routine.
modifications.reason: Preserve the compatible third-party attribution and license required for redistributing the copied routine.

modifications.change: Added a prominent Apache-2.0 modification notice, repointed @paper-design/shaders imports to copied source-local modules, mapped prefers-reduced-motion to the supplied frame at speed zero, and added a deterministic solid-color fallback when WebGL2 is unavailable. Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.
modifications.reason: Meet the shortlist fallback and reduced-motion requirements once in the shared mount used by every selected shader.

modifications.reason: Make the copied TypeScript import closure resolve after shadcn installation and in Next.js production builds.
